title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_manager.py (第 29 至 80 行，共 446 行) ---
  29 | class MemoryManager:
  30 |     """
  31 |     统一记忆编排入口。
  32 | 
  33 |     该类不替代底层三层记忆的数据结构，而是提供稳定的高层 API：
  34 |     - add_message / save_summary
  35 |     - compress_messages
  36 |     - search / retrieve_by_file_path / retrieve_by_error_type
  37 |     - export_memories / import_memories
  38 |     - get_statistics / clear
  39 |     """
  40 | 
  41 |     def __init__(
  42 |         self,
  43 |         working_max_size: int = 20,
  44 |         episodic_max_size: int = 50,
  45 |         long_term_storage_dir: str = "memory/long_term",
  46 |         plan_manager: Any = None,
  47 |         enabled: bool = True,
  48 |         working_memory: Optional[WorkingMemory] = None,
  49 |         episodic_memory: Optional[EpisodicMemory] = None,
  50 |         long_term_memory: Optional[LongTermMemory] = None,
  51 |         compression_engine: Optional[CompressionEngine] = None,
  52 |     ):
  53 |         self.enabled = enabled
  54 |         self.working_memory = working_memory or WorkingMemory(max_size=working_max_size)
  55 |         self.episodic_memory = episodic_memory or EpisodicMemory(max_size=episodic_max_size)
  56 |         self.long_term_memory = long_term_memory or LongTermMemory(storage_dir=long_term_storage_dir)
  57 |         self.compression_engine = compression_engine or CompressionEngine(
  58 |             plan_manager=plan_manager,
  59 |             memory_manager=self,
  60 |         )
  61 |         if compression_engine is not None and getattr(compression_engine, "memory_manager", None) is None:
  62 |             compression_engine.memory_manager = self
  63 |         self.retriever = MemoryRetriever(
  64 |             self.working_memory,
  65 |             self.episodic_memory,
  66 |             self.long_term_memory,
  67 |         )
  68 |         self.context_builder = MemoryContextBuilder()
  69 | 
  70 |     def add_message(self, message: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
  71 |         """添加消息到工作记忆，返回被 FIFO 淘汰的消息。"""
  72 |         if not self.enabled:
  73 |             return None
  74 |         return self.working_memory.add(message)
  75 | 
  76 |     def reset_working_memory(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:
  77 |         """用给定消息重建工作记忆。"""
  78 |         if not self.enabled:
  79 |             return
  80 |         self.working_memory.clear()
--- 读取完毕 ---

  30 |     """
  31 |     统一记忆编排入口。

  38 |     - get_statistics / clear
  39 |     """
  40 | 
  41 |     def __init__(
  42 |         self,
  43 |         working_max_size: int = 20,

  45 |         long_term_storage_dir: str = "memory/long_term",

  53 |         self.enabled = enabled
  54 |         self.working_memory = working_memory or WorkingMemory(max_size=working_max_size)
  55 |         self.episodic_memory = episodic_memory or EpisodicMemory(max_size=episodic_max_size)
  56 |         self.long_term_memory = long_term_memory or LongTermMemory(storage_dir=long_term_storage_dir)
  57 |         self.compression_engine = compression_engine or CompressionEngine(
  58 |             plan_manager=plan_manager,
  59 |             memory_manager=self,
  60 |         )
  61 |         if compression_engine is not None and getattr(compression_engine, "memory_manager", None) is None:
  62 |             compression_engine.memory_manager = self
  63 |         self.retriever = MemoryRetriever(
  64 |             self.working_memory,
  65 |             self.episodic_memory,
  66 |             self.long_term_memory,
  67 |         )
  68 |         self.context_builder = MemoryContextBuilder()
  69 | 
  70 |     def add_message(self, message: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
  71 |         """添加消息到工作记忆，返回被 FIFO 淘汰的消息。"""
  72 |         if not self.enabled:

  74 |         return self.working_memory.add(message)
  75 | 
  76 |     def reset_working_memory(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:
  77 |         """用给定消息重建工作记忆。"""
  78 |         if not self.enabled:
  79 |             return
